vocab.meaning: việc duy trì vẻ bề ngoài
vocab.example: I don't carry a mirror because I'm not overly concerned with constant aesthetic maintenance while I'm out.
If I were to take one with me, I would opt for a mirror made of shatterproof material to ensure safety in my bag.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế tiết kiệm diện tích
vocab.example: Most modern pocket mirrors feature a space-saving design that fits perfectly into a small coin purse.

vocab.meaning: phản hồi tức thì (về diện mạo)
vocab.example: A mirror provides instant feedback on whether your hair is messy or if there's something stuck in your teeth.

vocab.meaning: sự tự mãn/chăm chút quá mức vào vẻ ngoài
vocab.example: Some might view carrying a mirror as a sign of personal vanity, but I see it as a practical tool for grooming.

vocab.meaning: không bị biến dạng (hình ảnh trung thực)
vocab.example: I only carry high-quality travel mirrors that offer a distortion-free reflection for accurate makeup application.

vocab.meaning: kiểm tra một cách khéo léo/kín đáo
vocab.example: Having a small mirror allows for a subtle check of one's appearance before an important interview.
I prefer not to carry extra accessories like mirrors because they tend to clutter up my handbag.

vocab.meaning: ánh sáng tích hợp (đèn LED đi kèm)
vocab.example: The latest portable mirrors often come with integrated lighting to compensate for dim environments.
For me, a mirror serves a purely utilitarian purpose, so I only bring one when I'm attending a formal event.
